bird.name: Kawall's amazon
bird.summary: Kawall's amazon (Amazona kawalli), also known as the white-faced amazon, white-cheeked amazon or Kawall's parrot, is a relatively large spe…

relations.subject: Kawall's amazon
relations.evidence: Although Kawall's amazon was only rediscovered in the wild relatively recently, it appears to be locally fairly common; however populations are declining due to habitat loss from deforestation. A certain amount of capture for the parrot trade also seems present. The species is currently classified as least concern by the IUCN
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
